name: Audio Transcription & Dictation Tools
description: Tools that turn speech into text for an individual user — dictation apps, meeting/media transcribers, and runnable open-source engines, compared across modes, accuracy, transcript features, privacy, platforms, and price

groups.name: General Information
groups.description: Vendor, lifecycle status, license, core purpose, and basic identifying information

attributes.name: Developer
attributes.description: Company, org, or individual behind the tool (Otter.ai, OpenAI, Nuance/Microsoft, Apple, etc.)

attributes.name: First Release
attributes.description: First public release. For built-ins (Apple/Windows dictation), use when the modern dictation feature shipped; note in comment

attributes.name: Status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status; one primary status

attributes.name: License
attributes.description: License of the tool itself

attributes.name: Primary Type
attributes.description: The tool's core purpose; multi-select when it genuinely does several

attributes.name: Website
attributes.description: Official product page or repository

groups.name: Input & Modes
groups.description: What the tool can take in and how it captures speech

attributes.name: Real-time Dictation
attributes.description: Live speak-to-type — your words appear as text as you talk

attributes.name: File Transcription
attributes.description: Can import/upload an existing audio or video file and transcribe it

attributes.name: Live Meeting Capture
attributes.description: Captures a live meeting — via a meeting bot that joins the call, or by recording system/conference audio

attributes.name: Streaming / Low-latency
attributes.description: Produces a running transcript of ongoing audio in near-real-time (vs batch-processing a finished recording)

attributes.name: Audio Sources
attributes.description: Where it can take audio from; multi-select

groups.name: Accuracy & Languages
groups.description: Recognition engine, language coverage, and accuracy signals

attributes.name: Underlying Engine
attributes.description: The recognition engine — Whisper, proprietary, Nuance, platform-native, etc. Name it when known

attributes.name: Language Count
attributes.description: Approximate number of supported languages for transcription. Use the vendor's stated count; note approx in comment. Higher is better

attributes.name: English Accuracy
attributes.description: Qualitative accuracy on clear English speech, from independent reviews/benchmarks. Note any published WER in the comment. Use null when there is no credible signal

attributes.name: Multilingual / Auto-detect
attributes.description: Can detect and transcribe non-English (or mixed-language) audio without manual language selection

attributes.name: Custom Vocabulary
attributes.description: Lets the user add domain terms, names, or acronyms to improve recognition

groups.name: Transcript Features
groups.description: What the tool does with the transcript once produced

attributes.name: Speaker Diarization
attributes.description: Labels who said what (Speaker 1/2, or named speakers)

attributes.name: Timestamps
attributes.description: Provides word- or segment-level timestamps

attributes.name: AI Summaries & Notes
attributes.description: Auto-generates summaries, action items, or meeting notes from the transcript

attributes.name: Built-in Editor
attributes.description: An in-app editor to review and correct the transcript (bonus: edit media by editing text, à la Descript)

attributes.name: Translation
attributes.description: Can translate the transcript into other languages

attributes.name: Export Formats
attributes.description: Output formats supported; multi-select

groups.name: Privacy & Data
groups.description: Where audio is processed and what happens to it

attributes.name: Processing Location
attributes.description: Where audio is actually processed. on-device for fully local; hybrid when local + optional cloud

attributes.name: Offline Capable
attributes.description: Works fully offline with no network connection (implies on-device processing)

attributes.name: Data Used for Training
attributes.description: Whether your audio/transcripts may be used to improve models, and the consent posture

attributes.name: Data Deletion Control
attributes.description: User can delete recordings/transcripts and/or set auto-deletion/retention

groups.name: Platforms & Integration
groups.description: Where the tool runs and what it connects to

attributes.name: Platforms
attributes.description: Where the tool runs; multi-select

attributes.name: System-wide Dictation
attributes.description: Dictation works in any app OS-wide (vs only inside the tool's own window). Relevant mainly for dictation tools

attributes.name: Integrations
attributes.description: Meeting/app integrations; multi-select

attributes.name: API / Automation
attributes.description: Offers an API, CLI, or scripting hook a power user can automate against

groups.name: Pricing
groups.description: Cost model, free tier, and entry price

attributes.name: Pricing Model
attributes.description: Select all that apply

attributes.name: Free Tier
attributes.description: A genuinely usable free plan (not just a time-limited trial)

attributes.name: Free Allowance
attributes.description: What the free tier includes (e.g. 300 min/mo, limited live notes, unlimited local). null if no free tier

attributes.name: Entry Price (USD/mo)
attributes.description: Cheapest paid plan billed monthly; lower is better. 0 when a real free tier covers core use, null for one-time/open-source with no subscription
